# Car Wash / Auto Detailing Site — Nigeria-First Research Brief

**Niche ID:** P3-car-wash-car-wash-detailing
**Vertical slug:** car-wash
**VN-ID:** VN-COM-AUT-003
**Niche family:** NF-COM-AUT (variant of used-car-dealer)
**Family role:** variant
**Research date:** 2026-04-26

## 1. Nigerian Business Reality
Car wash businesses in Nigeria range from hand-wash bays in estate car parks (₦2,000–₦5,000 per wash) to premium machine-wash and detailing studios (₦15,000–₦80,000 for full detailing). Lekki, Victoria Island, GRA Port Harcourt, and Gwarinpa Abuja are premium location clusters. Saturday morning wash culture is strong — weekend queues are a standard marketing signal. Corporate fleet washing contracts and subscription monthly wash packages are emerging revenue streams. LASEPA (Lagos State Environmental Protection Agency) regulates wastewater discharge; non-compliant operators face closures.

## 2. Target Audience Profile
- **Professional Ngozi, 32, Lekki**: Toyota Camry owner who books WhatsApp Saturday wash slot. Wants exterior + interior clean plus air freshener. Budget ₦8,000.
- **Fleet coordinator Emeka, 40, Ikeja**: Manages 15-vehicle corporate fleet. Needs weekly wash contract with bulk pricing. Wants invoice and bank transfer payment.
- **Car enthusiast Seun, 26, Ibadan**: Wants full exterior detailing, ceramic coating, tint service. Researches online via Instagram first, then WhatsApps for quote.

## 3. Recommended Website Structure
- **Home**: Hero (shop name, "Saturday Wash Culture Starts Here"), WhatsApp booking CTA, package cards (Basic/Premium/Detail with ₦ prices), trust strip (LASEPA, CAC, before/after photos), location
- **About**: Business story, team, LASEPA compliance, equipment description, fleet contract experience
- **Services**: Package details with inclusions, pricing table, add-ons (wax, tint, ceramic coat), fleet contract enquiry
- **Contact**: WhatsApp booking (primary), location map, online booking form (NDPR-compliant)

## 4. Content Tone & Voice
Fresh, aspirational, and quality-focused. "Spotless Every Time", "Premium Saturday Detail", "Fleet Contract Available". Primary CTA: "Book Your Wash via WhatsApp". Secondary: "View Packages". Avoid: generic western car imagery.

## 5. Trust Signal Inventory
- LASEPA wastewater discharge compliance certificate
- CAC business registration
- Before/after photo gallery
- Customer testimonials (Nigerian names)
- Fleet contract client list (anonymised)
- Equipment brand display (Karcher, etc.)
- Saturday appointment availability badge

## 6. Image Direction (5-7 Specific Concepts)
1. Gleaming vehicle after wash — Nigerian residential estate, sunny Saturday morning
2. Detailing in progress — worker applying polish close-up, professional appearance
3. Car wash bay — busy Saturday, multiple vehicles, Nigerian attendants
4. Interior clean result — premium detailing, leather seats, dashboard sparkle
5. Fleet washing — corporate vehicles lined up, before/after contrast
6. Ceramic coating application — specialist technician, professional equipment
7. Happy customer collecting car — Nigerian customer smiling, keys exchange

## 7. Regulatory Compliance Checklist
- [ ] LASEPA wastewater discharge compliance
- [ ] CAC business registration number
- [ ] Industrial water use permit (if applicable)
- [ ] NDPR consent on booking form
- [ ] Health & safety signage (chemical handling)

## 8. Nigeria-First Compliance Checklist
- [x] WhatsApp booking CTA prominent
- [x] LASEPA compliance signal
- [x] Saturday wash culture reference
- [x] ₦ package pricing visible
- [x] Nigerian estate/GRA location references
- [x] Mobile-first layout
- [x] esc() on all inputs
- [x] NDPR on booking form
